channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: At least 2 dead, multiple wounded in shooting at Toronto street festival
item.description: At least two people are dead and several others injured after a shooting at a street festival in Toronto, police reported.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham dies after brief and sudden illness
item.description: President Trump paid tribute to the late senator, who was reportedly scheduled for a Sunday interview.

item.title: U.S. launches third round of retaliatory strikes on Iran, Pentagon confirms
item.description: The strikes were in response to an attack on a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham dies after sudden illness, office confirms
item.description: Carissa Lawson anchored a CBS News special report on the senator's death.
